message:
fix: retry stale DB connection and preserve temp file in bd edit (GH-2267)

After a long or suspended editor session, the Dolt connection may time out.
Now retries once after pinging the pool, and on failure preserves the temp
file and reports its path so user edits are never lost.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
